org.docgene.api

Interface FontSize


  • public interface FontSize
    The named font sizes enumeration.
    Since:
    1.6

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String LARGE
      "large".
      static java.lang.String MEDIUM
      "medium".
      static java.lang.String SMALL
      "small".
      static java.lang.String X_LARGE
      "x-large".
      static java.lang.String X_SMALL
      "x-small".
      static java.lang.String XX_LARGE
      "xx-large".
      static java.lang.String XX_SMALL
      "xx-small".
